context: Evaluates the full standards review flow: file path, parsing, one-at-a-time interview, recap, confirmation, and report writing.

checklist.name: File path obtained and file read
checklist.description: The agent asks for or accepts the file path, then reads and parses the file

checklist.name: Standards correctly parsed
checklist.description: The agent identifies exactly 2 standards from the Markdown headings

checklist.name: One standard per question turn
checklist.description: Each question tool call presents exactly one standard — never bundles multiple standards

checklist.name: Options are 3-4 concrete choices
checklist.description: Each standard question offers 3-4 options (Accept/Revise/Reject/Other) with descriptions

checklist.name: Recap presented before report
checklist.description: A summary table of all standards and their actions is shown before the report is written

checklist.name: Explicit confirmation requested
checklist.description: The agent asks the user to confirm the recap is correct before writing the report

checklist.name: Report file written
checklist.description: A report file is written matching the confirmed answers
